title: Human Biomonitoring Resources - Canada.ca
content:
## Human Biomonitoring Resources

## Biomonitoring fact sheets
These fact sheets provide general information about environmental chemicals and the levels of these chemicals measured in people. Levels are shown for the Canadian population as well as for specific sub-groups, such as First Nations Peoples and people who are pregnant. Changes over time are also highlighted.
